channel.title: Policy-as-Code on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Policy-as-Code on Pi Stack

item.title: Kyverno vs OPA Gatekeeper vs Trivy Operator: Kubernetes Policy Enforcement 2026
item.description: Kubernetes clusters run dozens of workloads across multiple teams and namespaces. Without policy enforcement, a single misconfigured deployment can expose sensitive data, exhaust resources, or introduce vulnerable container images. Policy-as-code tools solve this by defining rules that automatically validate and mutate Kubernetes resources before they reach the cluster.
